title: S + be + accustomed/committed/dedicated + to + V-ing

formulas.zh: 主詞 + 動詞 be + 形容詞 + to + 動名詞（to 為介系詞）
主詞 + 動詞 be + 形容詞 + to + 名詞（to 為介系詞）

explanation: 此句型用來表達主詞對某事物或某行為的態度、習慣或傾向。形容詞與 to 之間為固定搭配，to 為介系詞而非不定詞符號。常見形容詞包括：accustomed、used、committed、devoted、opposed、resistant、similar、equal 等。需特別注意 to 後接動名詞（V-ing）或名詞，切勿誤用不定詞。此句型常用於描述已養成的習慣、堅定的立場或內在特質。

examples.eng: She is accustomed to getting up early in the morning.
examples.chi: 她習慣於每天早上早起。

examples.eng: The company is committed to reducing carbon emissions by 2030.
examples.chi: 該公司承諾於 2030 年前減少碳排放。

examples.eng: Many people are opposed to changing the current education system.
examples.chi: 許多人反對改變現行教育制度。

examples.eng: He is devoted to helping disadvantaged children through his charity work.
examples.chi: 他透過慈善工作致力於幫助弱勢兒童。

extension.tip: 判斷 to 是介系詞還是不定詞符號的關鍵：若 to 後可直接跟名詞、動名詞、代名詞，則為介系詞；若後接動詞原形，則為不定詞符號。此句型中 to 恆為介系詞，故必須接動名詞（V-ing）或名詞。常見錯誤為寫成 be used to do 的不定詞用法。

examples.test: She is used to getting up early. ✓ vs. She is used to get up early. ✗
examples.result: → to 為介系詞，必須接動名詞 getting，不可接不定詞 get

examples.test: He is committed to working on this project. ✓ vs. He is committed to work on this project. ✗
examples.result: → 介系詞用法需搭配動名詞 working，不可用不定詞形式

examples.test: They are opposed to violence. ✓ vs. They are opposed to violencing. ✗
examples.result: → to 後可接名詞 violence，不一定要動名詞；但接動詞概念則用動名詞

extension.note: 記住這些形容詞都帶 to 介系詞：accustomed/used/opposed/committed/devoted/dedicated/similar/equal/resistant，to 後必接動名詞（V-ing）或名詞，絕不接不定詞。

parts: a daily walk in the park.
exercises.sentence: The elderly man is accustomed to taking a daily walk in the park.
exercises.translation: 這位老人習慣於每天在公園裡散步。

exercises.sentence: Our organization is committed to promoting renewable energy sources.
exercises.translation: 我們的組織致力於推廣可再生能源。

exercises.sentence: Many citizens are opposed to using excessive plastic bags in supermarkets.
exercises.translation: 許多市民反對在超市使用過多的塑膠袋。

parts: new technology often perform better in online learning.
exercises.sentence: Students who are not resistant to adapting to new technology often perform better in online learning.
exercises.translation: 不抗拒適應新科技的學生通常在線上學習中表現更好。

vocab_table_label: 常用 to + V-ing 片語
